) AS FQ RIGHT OUTER JOIN
dbo.WorkOrder ON FQ.ParentSystemID = dbo.WorkOrder.ParentSystemID
 AND FQ.WoTradeID = dbo.WorkOrder.WOTradeID Inner Join
dbo.RequestionPart On dbo.WorkOrder.ID = dbo.RequestionPart.WO_ID
WHERE (RequestionPart.ID LIKE '{0}')
